title: Crunchy Brazilian Vermicelli Pasta
description: A comforting umami-rich Brazilian dish featuring tender vermicelli pasta with a crispy finish, made halal-friendly with safe cooking practices.

ingredients.name: vermicelli pasta
ingredients.notes: use dry pasta for halal compliance

instructions: Boil water in a pot, add 150g vermicelli pasta, and cook according to package instructions (about 8-10 minutes) until al dente.
In a separate pan, heat 2 tbsp halal-certified soy sauce over medium heat until warm.
Drain the pasta, then quickly toss with the warm soy sauce to coat evenly.
For crunch, sprinkle a light layer of toasted sesame seeds over the pasta and let it sit for 2 minutes to achieve a crispy texture.
